subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest the burning of Thy loved ones in their separation from Thee, and their agitation in the wilderness of remoteness, yearning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری احتراق احبائک فی فراقک و اضطرابهم فی بیدآء البعد شوقا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @presence of; reunion with God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
